tasks.title: Fix memory leak in sidebar component
tasks.description: Clean up event listeners on unmount in useTheme to prevent leak.

tasks.title: Enable Partial Prerendering (PPR)
tasks.description: Set cacheComponents: true and toggle experimental flags in nextConfig.

tasks.title: Add React 19 View Transitions
tasks.description: Implement shared element morphing between photogrid and photo details.

products.name: Sword of Light
products.description: A radiant, shimmering blade forged in the solar forge. Emits a soft, warm light that repels dark entities.

products.name: Shield of Shadows
products.description: Forged in the obsidian caves, this shield absorbs incoming spells and converts them into pure mana for the bearer.

products.name: Elixir of Life
products.description: Instantly heals all injuries and restores physical stamina to peak levels. Crafted from distilled stardust.

products.name: Helm of Wisdom
products.description: An enchanted bronze crown that increases cognitive capacity and grants immediate understanding of ancient glyphs.

notes.title: React 19 Server Functions architecture
notes.content: Server actions act as secure RPC endpoints. The client initiates POST requests carrying serialized argument structures. It supports progressive enhancement by default.

notes.title: PPR caching lifecycles
notes.content: PPR static shells are prerendered and cached at build-time or edge points. Dynamic segments stream downstream using Suspense chunks over HTTP transfer-encoding chunked.
